exec: pm.test("Dashboard events list is not empty", function () {
pm.expect(item, `Item at index ${index} should be an object`).to.be.an("object");
pm.expect(item, `Item at index ${index} should have label`).to.have.property("label");
pm.expect(item.label, `label at index ${index} should be a string`).to.be.a("string");
pm.expect(item.label.trim(), `label at index ${index} should not be empty`).to.not.eql("");
pm.test("Each item has valid eventType, summary item may have null", function () {
pm.expect(item, `Item at index ${index} should have eventType field`).to.have.property("eventType");
`"Общая статистика" at index ${index} should have eventType = null`
`eventType at index ${index} should exist for non-summary item`
`eventType at index ${index} should be a string`
`eventType at index ${index} should not be empty`
